meta.purpose: Named generated background scenes. Each is a farming/nature backdrop in the reference mood (see brand/art-direction.json). Briefs reference a scene id exactly like a library photo; engine/image.ts generates it via gpt-image-1 (cached) or renders a deterministic on-palette placeholder when no API key is present. The template owns ALL text; scenes are atmosphere only.

scenes.subject: a tall green maize field at golden hour, low sun raking through the leaves, a calm sky above, no people
close-up of anonymous weathered hands crumbling rich red-brown tilled soil, warm side light, shallow depth of field
neat rows of young green maize seedlings emerging from dark soil, soft morning light, receding to a low horizon, no people
a dramatic dark storm sky building over a maize field, a shaft of warm light on the crop below, tension in the weather, no people
an arc of irrigation water catching first light over a green field at dawn, mist rising, cool-to-warm gradient, no people
cracked dry earth in warm light with a single small green shoot pushing through, shallow depth of field, no people
anonymous hands cradling freshly harvested maize cobs, warm golden light, out-of-focus field behind, no faces
a high aerial view of contoured farmland, curved ridges and green-gold field patches like an abstract quilt, warm light, no people
the edge of a farmed field meeting warm-toned msasa woodland at golden hour, Southern African savanna light, no people
a lush smallholder vegetable garden in soft morning light, leafy rows and a watering can, dew on the leaves, no people
a rural curing barn beside a field at warm dusk, smoke and soft haze, long shadows, Southern African farmstead, no people
an abstract macro of warm crumbly loam soil with fine grain and shallow focus, earthy ochre and brown tones, no people
